title: austrostipa nivicola
intro: Austrostipa nivicola, also known as the mountain grass or snow grass, is a type of perennial grass native to Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Austrostipa nivicola include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and soothing coughs and colds. Austrostipa nivicola can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and poultices, which can be made by drying and crushing the leaves and stems of the plant.
